scripts.build: mkdir -p vendor && cp node_modules/maplibre-gl/dist/maplibre-gl.js vendor/ && cp node_modules/maplibre-gl/dist/maplibre-gl.css vendor/ && cp node_modules/pmtiles/dist/pmtiles.js vendor/ && cp node_modules/chart.js/dist/chart.umd.js vendor/
scripts.update: cd updater && uv run anatel.py && uv run ibge.py && uv run municipalities.py && uv run pmtiles.py
